_schema.description: Avana Surgical job openings. Set active:false to hide a role from the site without deleting it. Managed via _tools/catalog-editor.html → Careers tab. To publish: Download → replace this file → git push.

fields.id: kebab-case unique identifier — also used in the email subject line
fields.title: Job title shown on the card
fields.department: Division label shown above the title (Endospine, Orthotics, Marketing, etc.)
fields.location: Free-text location string (e.g. Chennai · Bangalore · Field role)
fields.active: true = show on site, false = hidden
fields.posted: ISO date when the role was posted (YYYY-MM-DD)
fields.description: Optional 1–3 sentence role summary shown on the card

openings.title: Territory Sales Manager
openings.location: Chennai · Bangalore · Mumbai · Delhi · Field role
openings.description: Drive adoption of Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery systems across your territory. You will work directly with spine surgeons, neurosurgeons and hospital procurement teams.

openings.title: Clinical Specialist — Bracing
openings.description: Support orthopaedic surgeons and physiotherapists in fitting and recommending Breg and Aspen bracing solutions. Clinical or paramedical background preferred.

openings.title: Brand & Content Lead
openings.description: Own Avana's digital presence — website, SEO, social, and educational content for surgeons and patients. Strong writing skills and a curiosity for medical devices essential.

openings.title: Service & Logistics Coordinator
openings.description: Coordinate product demos, repairs, and pan-India shipments. You are the engine that keeps field teams running on time.
